authors: Stauss T, El Majdoub F, Sayed D, Surges G, Rosenberg WS, Kapural L, Bundschu R, Lalkhen A, Patel N, Gliner B, Subbaroyan J, Rotte A, Edgar DR, Bettag M, Maarouf M
title: A multicenter real-world review of 10 kHz SCS outcomes for treatment of chronic trunk and/or limb pain
journal_name: Annals of Clinical and Translational Neurology
study_question: Real-world efficacy of 10 kHz SCS for chronic trunk and/or limb pain.
population_assessed: 1660 chronic trunk and/or limb pain patients trialed or implanted with 10 kHz SCS.
outcome_measures: Responder rate, pain relief, function, sleep, quality of life, medication intake
inclusion_criteria: Chronic trunk and/or limb pain; trialed and/or implanted April 2014-January 2018.
answer_to_study_question: Over 70% achieved sustained pain relief; many improved function, sleep, quality of life.
